name: Sun-Dried Tomato & Basil Pasta Sauce/Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar
4 large sun-dried tomatoes packed in oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Add basil to the food processor.
2. With the machine running, feed garlic through the feed tube and mince.
3. Scrape down the sides of the bowl.
4. Add drained sun-dried tomatoes and process until finely chopped, scraping down the bowl as needed.
5. Add olive oil, vinegar, salt, sugar, and red pepper flakes.
6. Process until the tomatoes are pureed, about 1 1/2 minutes. (The sauce can be prepared up to 6 hours in advance. Transfer to a small bowl, cover, and let stand at room temperature. Re-whisk before using if necessary.)
